# Password Reset

To recover a forgotten password, select the "Forgot password" link on the sign-in screen and supply the email address on file. A reset link that stays valid for one hour is delivered to that address. Following the link lets the customer set a new password, which must be at least ten characters long and include one number and one symbol.

[Source: account_management.md#password-reset]
